description: Pre-seance morning check : Body Battery, sleep, HRV, RHR, readiness, stress.

panels.title: Recovery Time (h)
panels.description: Source : recoveryTime natif Garmin (minutes), divise par 60 pour heures.

panels.title: Month at a Glance — Daily Average (30j)
panels.description: Vue calendrier multi-métrique : RHR, Stress, Active, BB, Steps, SpO2, Sleep score, Sleep, HRV.

panels.title: HR Distribution (histogram intraday)

targets.query: select mean_value from (SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value <= 96
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value > 96
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value < 60
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value > 110

panels.description: Distribution FC sur fenêtre, avec seuils sleep/active/peak.

panels.title: HR Range daily (Max-Min)
panels.description: Spread FC quotidien : spread bas = système autonome stressé.

panels.title: Selected time range at a Glance

targets.query: SELECT max("totalDistanceMeters") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT max("totalSteps") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT sum("sleepingSeconds") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT max("highStressDuration") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT max("highlyActiveSeconds") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT max("restingHeartRate") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT max("averageSpo2") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')
SELECT max("bodyBatteryChargedValue") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC tz('Europe/Paris')

panels.description: Synthèse table de la fenêtre sélectionnée.

title: 01 Daily Readiness & Recovery
